summary: Backend testing completed for Machine Assignment Engine with French terminology. All 25 tests PASSED. Verified: reset-all, demo-load, operations-enrichies (jointure order_id), diagnostic/assignment, FORBID rule (ART003/PLIEUSE_01), PREFER rule (USINAGE/TOUR_CNC_01), date_besoin sorting.
seed_data_creation: Demo data loaded via /api/demo/load for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Machine assignment engine with French terminology fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/reset-all, POST /api/demo/load, GET /api/operations-enrichies, GET /api/diagnostic/assignment. Demo data: 3 centres de charge (PLI01, USI01, ASS01), 7 machines, 3 ordres (OF001, OF002, OF003), 7 operations, 3 business rules. FORBID rule correctly prevents OF003_10 (ART003/PLIAGE) from PLIEUSE_01 -> assigned to PLIEUSE_02. PREFER rule correctly assigns all USINAGE ops to TOUR_CNC_01. Date_besoin sorting works: OF003 (2026-03-10) processed first as most urgent.

TestDemoLoad.test_demo_data_counts: PASS - 3 centres, 7 machines, 3 orders, 7 ops, 3 rules

business_rules_verification.FORBID_ART003_PLIEUSE_01: ✓ OF003_10 (ART003/PLIAGE) correctly assigned to PLIEUSE_02, NOT PLIEUSE_01
business_rules_verification.PREFER_USINAGE_TOUR_CNC_01: ✓ All USINAGE operations assigned to TOUR_CNC_01
